\tzpentry{ID5662}{Magnetic Field}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5662 introduces Magnetic Field as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \mathbf{B}_{\mathrm{total}}(\mathbf{r},t) = \mathbf{B}_{\mathrm{dip}}(\mathbf{r};\boldsymbol{\mu}_1(t),r_1) +\mathbf{B}_{\mathrm{dip}}(\mathbf{r};\boldsymbol{\mu}_2(t),r_2) +\mathbf{B}_{\mathrm{constraint}}(\mathbf{r},t)\,. \end{equation}
